title: BANSHAN 24 PCS Clothes Pegs For Washing Line, Beach Towel Clips, Plastic Laundry Pegs, Garden, Sunbeds Sun Loungers Pool Chairs (4 Colors)
features: Bulk Pack - 24Pcs Super valued pack of plastic clothes pegs, Composed of 4 colors, great for baby clothes, saliva towel or bib, wall photo decoration, memo or other small stuffs, everyday use home or travel. Stylish design, can decorate your life, let you also have a beautiful mood when drying clothes.

Long-lasting and Durable - Our washing line pegs are made of high quality PP materials and with a STRONG SPRING that keeps your laundry in place even in stormy weather. Smooth edges and no-slip teeth keep your clothes secure. Rust-resistant, colourfast, odourless.
Size of Laundry Pegs - 2.86 inch in length, the tail is 1.13 inch high. The clip can be opened up to 0.84 inch. Will securely hold even heavy items of clothing, enduring extreme windy weather.

Wide Use - Work perfectly and repeatly for outdoor or indoor use. Ideal for clothing in the laundry room or closet, for towels in the bathroom, and for plastic bags and other things in the kitchen. Perfect for crafts, party,baby room displays,organizing documents, cards, bills or holding ornaments and gifts.
Lightweight and Easy to Carry-clip with Zinc Alloy - rust resistant.No harm smell and Environmentally friendly.The single weight is 15g.
description: Product Description Strong Load-Bearing Capacity The thicker steel wire is stronger, not only for summer clothes but also for coats, children's toys and bedding. Humanized Design The non-slip design of the pick-up place makes it more labour-saving to pick up, and the intimate design is just for you. High-Quality Materials Plastic has good elasticity, resistance to bending and deformation is non-toxic and odourless. Colorful Clothes Pegs for Washing Line Includes Interlocking Soft Cushioned Grip - no unwanted peg marks or pulls on your clothes. Secure Grip - the clothes pegs are designed to be kind to your clothes while ensuring your clothes are held safely on the line! Vibrant Colours- Clothes clips come in a variety of random colours, suitable for class, photo clips, clothes drying and other purposes.
